# Submissions

## Call for abstracts

**Important Dates**

  - **November 24th**: Call for abstracts opens
  - **January 30th**: Call for abstracts closes

  [Submit your abstract here!](https://openreview.net/group?id=bioconductor.org/EuroBioC/2026/Conference)


## Submission types

### Short talk

Short talk immediately followed by questions, focused on a
package, or on a research or technological question that motivates software
development. Presentations seeking collaboration or input from the community
are encouraged.


### Poster

Classical portrait printed A0-poster to be showcased during poster session.



## Questions?

Do not hesitate to contact the [organizers](organizers.html) at
[eurobioc@bioconductor.org](mailto:eurobioc@bioconductor.org) if you have
a question about an abstract submission.
